programme.desc: U.S. lawyers (Anthony Hopkins, Matthew McConaughey) defend Africans who revolted against their Spanish captors aboard a slave ship in 1839.

programme.title: Heartburn
programme.desc: Rachel Samstat, a New York food critic, beds Mark Forman, a Washington, D.C., newspaper columnist. The two fall in love, and Rachel relinquishes her job and relocates to be with a man who views himself as unfit for marriage.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: Three 50-ish college friends (Goldie Hawn, Bette Midler, Diane Keaton) plot revenge after their husbands dump them for younger women.

programme.title: John Grisham's The Rainmaker

programme.title: Seabiscuit
programme.desc: A jockey (Tobey Maguire), an automobile magnate (Jeff Bridges) and a trainer (Chris Cooper) lead a racehorse to glory during the Great Depression.

programme.title: Rounders
programme.desc: The release of his debt-ridden pal (Edward Norton) from jail spurs a law student (Matt Damon) to resume high-stakes gambling.

programme.title: Save the Last Dance
programme.desc: A white teenager (Julia Stiles) moves to Chicago after her mother's death and falls for a black student (Sean Patrick Thomas) who shares her love of dance.

programme.title: Soul Men
programme.desc: Old animosities re-emerge when two estranged singers (Samuel L. Jackson, Bernie Mac) travel cross-country to perform in a tribute concert for their late band leader.

programme.title: Failure to Launch

programme.title: Derbez en Cuando

programme.title: La escuelita VIP

programme.title: Perdiendo el juicio

programme.title: La CQ: Nuevo ingreso

programme.title: ¿Es neta, Eva?

programme.title: El príncipe del barrio

programme.title: Está libre

programme.title: ¿Tú crees?

programme.title: Tal para cual

programme.title: Bola de locos

programme.title: La familia P. Luche

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles

programme.title: María de Todos los Ángeles

programme.desc: Waffles in Anchorage, Alaska, and steak tacos in Aspen, Colo.; in Albuquerque, N.M., a Latin place makes repas and pork paninis.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy's hitting up a taco joint going above and beyond with their Ahogada Torta and a quesadilla-taco-au jus mashup; a Thai spot is piling up the pork and dynamite dumplings; a funky food truck is loading up monster sandwiches.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Garland, a century-old staple serving up tasty sandwiches and a sweet treat; in Oklahoma City, a local landmark is dishing out Southern specialties, and in Denver, a spot putting a healthy spin on classic comfort foods.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Fargo, N.D., a funky place is piling barbecue onto mac and heating up wings; a Mexican joint in Parkland, Fla., is pumping out righteous recipes inside a gas station; a scratch-made spot servin' up hearty home cooking in Philadelphia.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond spotlights different kinds of potatoes in a variety of delicious dishes; purple sweet potato soup with a pistachio crumble, corned beef hash with roasted russets and sweet potatoes, and potato dumplings with leftover mashed potatoes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her sister Betsy bring a taste of Seattle to the prairie; they whip up a clam dip and Betsy's potato chips, crispy savory pancakes and a baked fontina cheese board, all washed down with a strawberry spritz.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Store-bought sauces take center stage as Ree Drummond makes pesto egg pockets and grilled chimichurri shrimp wraps; cheese sauce takes cheesesteak burgers to the next level, and enchilada sauce is a wonderful shortcut in a Tex-Mex skillet.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking on the countertop; she puts together a speedy all-in-one sausage and potato soup in the pressure cooker; then, the air fryer is perfect for a fast BBQ chicken bagel pizza; the microwave serves up a quick brownie bowl.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro makes a Hot Dog Grilled Cheese Sandwich, and Katie Lee Biegel takes on a hot-topic food in two ways with Strawberry Cottage Cheese Ice Cream and a Turkey Club Cottage Cheese Wrap.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Hoda Kotb joins Ina Garten to talk about memories and game-changing moments. Ina shows Hoda how to assemble an Easy Mezze Board with Marinated Herbed Feta that is perfect for effortless entertaining, and they make the best Fried Chicken Sandwiches.

programme.title: Be My Guest With Ina Garten
programme.desc: Ina Garten invites journalist Frank Bruni to the barn, where he shares his life story and a boulevardier cocktail to be served alongside Ina's Parmesan thyme crackers; Ina treats Frank to a Gruyère and herb omelet lesson.

programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programme.desc: The competition's first $20,000 prize winner is back to take on Michelle Wallace and Adam Greenberg in Guy Fieri's over-the-top challenge; judges Jet Tila and Jonathon Sawyer are on hand to taste the most bodacious dishes in Flavortown history.

programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is challenging America's best chefs to compete in his ever-changing lineup of outside-the-box Flavortown restaurants, from food carts to fine dining; with $20,000 on the line, these chefs will need to be prepared for anything.

programme.title: Flavortown Food Fight
programme.desc: Fieri challenges the competitors to leave the plates behind and serve everything in a bowl; the returning champion takes on chefs Martel Stone and Evelyn Garcia to win over judges Antonia Lofaso and Aaron May in Flavortown's fiercest competition yet.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's headed on some tasty trips back in time, starting with an old schoolhouse in Ohio that has a comfort food curriculum; former church in Redmond, Ore., puts out heavenly pizza; a retro joint in Stamford, Conn., dishes out diner classics.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy is setting his sights on seafood and creative comfort; Stephanie Izard's Chicago joint puts out elevated diner fare like Szechuan biscuit sandwiches; in Florida, Guy finds gangster gumbo, off-the-hook etouffee and a righteous Reuben.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into all kinds of 'cue on this trip; in Ottawa, Canada, a funky chicken joint cranking the rotisserie; in Burlington, Vt., a place smokin' their wings; Texas-style spot in Richmond, Va.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Atlanta, righteous chicken and biscuits and house-cured lox; across town, brisket burger and chicken-fried ribs; in Fort Collins, Colo., vegetarian specialties like tomatillo and chickpea pizza and a savory cauliflower steak.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri finds all kinds of unexpected flavor, starting with next-level sandwiches in Cleveland with Chef Michael Symon; a New Jersey joint is amping up bar bites, and a chef in La Quinta, Calif., reinvents her mom's chilaquiles.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy's digging into dishes from beef to buns and in Logan, Utah, a place is serving up worldwide flavor, like lomo saltado and a peanut butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
